column5: I purchased tickets for the April 8 showing of The Grand Illusion but the event was cancelled without any prior notice. I would like a full refund please.
Hello John, I have reviewed your booking and confirmed that the event was indeed cancelled by the venue. I will process your full refund now.
Thank you for the quick response. How long will it take for the refund to appear in my account?
Refunds typically take 3 to 5 business days to reflect. You will receive an email confirmation once processed. Please check with your bank if it does not appear within 7 days.
Understood. Appreciate the help!
Case RF001 reviewed. Refund approved and processed. Good customer handling noted for tommypark.
I was charged twice for the exact same booking! This is completely unacceptable. The second transaction is TXN20260407005.
Hello Alex, I sincerely apologize for this error. I can see both charges in our system. I am initiating an immediate refund for the duplicate transaction.
Thank you. Please make sure this kind of error does not happen again.
The refund has been processed. I have flagged this for our payment team to investigate. You should see it within 3 to 5 business days.
Reviewed RF002. Duplicate charge linked to a payment gateway retry bug. Escalated to IT for a permanent fix.
The seat in Row C Seat 12 was completely broken - the back was snapped off. I had to stand for most of the show. I want a refund.
Hello Mike, I am very sorry to hear this. That is unacceptable. I will process a full refund and flag this seat for maintenance immediately.
I appreciate that. Any chance of some form of compensation beyond the refund for the terrible experience?
Absolutely. I have added a complimentary ticket credit worth RM50 to your account as compensation. It expires in 90 days.
That is very generous, thank you so much! I will use it soon.
Hi, I accidentally bought tickets for Interstellar when I meant to buy Avatar. Can I get a refund or swap?
Hello Sarah, no problem at all. I can process a refund for the Interstellar tickets. Would you also like me to check seat availability for Avatar on the same date?
Yes please! Same time if possible, 8 PM showing.
Great news. I have secured you two seats for the Avatar 8 PM showing and initiated the refund for Interstellar. New booking confirmation has been sent to your email.
Perfect! You are amazing, thank you!
I just got charged RM500 for what should have been a RM90 ticket. This is a massive error! What happened?
Hello Jason, I am very sorry about this. I can see the erroneous charge. This appears to be a pricing system error. I am escalating this immediately.
Please sort this out urgently. RM500 is a lot of money. I need this reversed today.
I completely understand. I have escalated this to our billing team as urgent. You will receive a callback within 2 hours. The overcharge will be fully reversed.
Critical billing error confirmed on RF005. Refund of RM410 approved and being processed by finance team. Customer to be notified.
The theater sent an email saying my booked event has been postponed by 3 months to July. I cannot attend in July. Can I get a refund?
Hello John, completely understandable. Since the postponement is significant, you are eligible for a full refund. I will process it now.
Thank you. Appreciate the flexibility.
I paid RM3999 for a Premium seat but when I arrived, I was seated in the Standard section. I want a refund of the price difference.
Hello Bob, I apologize for this mix-up. Can you please provide your seat assignment details so I can verify what happened?
I was assigned Seat G7 in the Standard zone but my ticket clearly shows Premium Row A.
I have confirmed the error in our seat allocation system. I will process a partial refund for the price difference and ensure your Premium seat is reserved for the next show.
Hi, I bought the wrong movie ticket by mistake. Can I get a refund for it?
I keep getting an error message saying invalid credentials when trying to login. I have reset my password twice but nothing works.
Hello Sarah, let me help you troubleshoot. Please try clearing your browser cache and cookies first, then attempt to login again.
I tried that on both Chrome and Firefox. Still getting the same error.
Understood. I have manually reset your account from our backend. A temporary password has been sent to your registered email. Please use that to login and then change it.
That worked! I am logged in now. Thank you for sorting that out!
The payment page just spins forever and never loads. This only happens on my mobile phone. I cannot complete my purchase.
Hello John, we have identified a compatibility issue affecting some Android devices. As a workaround, please try opening our website in your mobile browser instead of the app.
The browser workaround worked! But please fix the app - this should not be happening.
Completely agree. Our development team has been notified and a fix is being tested. Expected release is within 48 hours. Thank you for your patience.
Okay, thank you. Please push the update quickly.
I completed my booking 3 hours ago but I have not received any confirmation email with my tickets. My payment has gone through.
Hello Alex, I can confirm your booking was successful in our system. There seems to have been an email delivery issue. I am resending your confirmation email now.
Received it! Thank you for the quick fix.
The app crashes every single time I try to pick a seat from the seat map. It goes back to the home screen immediately.
Hello Daniel, sorry about this. What is your device model and operating system version? This will help us pinpoint the issue.
I am using a Samsung Galaxy S23 running Android 14.
Thank you. We have reproduced the crash on Android 14 - it is related to a recent update. Our team is working on a patch. I will notify you when it is available.
I am standing at the theater entrance right now and the scanner cannot read my QR code. Please help urgently!
Hello Mike, please try taking a screenshot of the QR code and showing that instead. Also try adjusting screen brightness to maximum.
The screenshot trick worked! I got in. But please fix this for the future.
The website completely crashed when I clicked checkout. I lost all my selected seats and have to start over. This is very frustrating!

Hello John, I sincerely apologize. We are aware of this critical issue - it is affecting multiple users. Our engineering team has been alerted and is working on an urgent fix. ETA is approximately 2 hours.
It is almost 4 hours now. Is it fixed? I need to complete my booking today before the seats sell out.
Great news - the fix was deployed at 15:00. The issue was a memory overflow in the checkout module. Your original seat selection has been preserved. Please try again now.
It worked! Booking completed successfully. Thank you for holding my seats.
I paid for two tickets but they are completely missing from my account. I have the bank charge confirmation. Order number ORD-2026-04-10-789456.
Hello Alex, I can see the payment was successfully processed on our end. The tickets appear to be stuck in a sync queue. Let me manually push them to your account now.
Still not showing. How long will this take?
I have forced the sync. Please log out of your account completely and log back in. Your tickets should now appear.
They are there now! Thank you. I was worried I had lost them.
My promo code LOYALTY2026 says it is invalid at checkout but the email I received says it is valid until May 31. Please help.
Hello Mike, I can see the code in our system and it is valid. Can you confirm exactly where in the checkout you are entering it? Sometimes it needs to be on the payment step, not the cart.
I was entering it on the cart page. Let me try on the payment step.
There is actually a bug where codes entered on the cart page are not being applied. I have reported this to development. In the meantime, please use the payment step to enter the code.
It worked on the payment page! Thank you for figuring that out.
The genre filter on the movie browse page is completely broken. I select Action and it shows everything including romance and documentaries.
Hello Sarah, thank you for reporting this. I have logged it as a bug and sent it to our development team. I will update you when there is a fix.
PR004 logged and assigned to dev. Filter bug confirmed reproducible across all browsers.
I have been trying to upload a profile picture for a week. I get a file format error even when using standard JPG photos from my phone.
Hello Jason, I can reproduce this issue. It seems our image validator has a bug where it rejects valid JPG files. I have flagged this to engineering.
Thank you. Please let me know when it is fixed.
I have clicked unsubscribe at least 5 times from your marketing emails over the past month and I am still receiving them. This should not be this hard.
Hello Bob, I sincerely apologize for this. I can see you have made multiple unsubscribe requests. I have manually removed you from all mailing lists right now. This will take effect within 24 hours.
Finally! Thank you. It should not have taken this long.
You are absolutely right. I have also submitted a bug report to fix the unsubscribe endpoint so this does not happen to others.
I received two separate booking confirmations for the exact same seat on the same date. How is that even possible?
Hello Jerry, this should never happen. I am investigating this immediately. Can you provide both confirmation numbers?
Sure. Confirmation codes are BKG-20260415-001 and BKG-20260415-002. Both show Seat B8 Row 3 on April 20.

Found it. A race condition during a high-traffic period caused the same seat to be booked simultaneously by two sessions. I have voided the duplicate and initiated a refund. The valid booking BKG-20260415-001 remains active.
Double booking incident reviewed. Root cause identified as session timeout race condition. Engineering team has been briefed. PR007 resolved successfully.
Hello, I would like to change my seat for the April 25 concert from Row C Seat 12 to somewhere in the Orchestra section if possible.
Hello Mike, I can help with that. We have several Orchestra seats available for April 25. Would you prefer center or side?
Center would be fantastic if available.
Great news! I have moved you from Row C Seat 12 to Orchestra Center Row A Seat 5. Your updated ticket confirmation has been sent to your email.
Wonderful! Thank you so much for making that happen.
Hi, I need to move my tickets from the 2 PM showing to the 7 PM evening showing on April 16. Is that possible?
Hello John, absolutely. The 7 PM showing still has availability. I will make that change for you now at no extra charge.
That would be perfect, thank you!
Done! Your tickets have been updated to the 7 PM evening showing on April 16. New e-tickets sent to your email.
Hi, my plans have changed and I can no longer attend on April 20. Is it possible to move my booking to April 27 for the same show?
Hello Sarah, of course. I can see seats are available on April 27 for the same show. I will make that change now.
Thank you so much. I was worried I would have to forfeit the tickets.
Hello, I wanted to ask how I can share a digital ticket with my friend who will be attending in my place? Can I transfer it to their account?
Hello John, you can transfer tickets through the My Tickets section. Click the ticket, select Transfer, and enter your friend's registered email address. They will receive the ticket instantly.
That is really easy, thank you!
We are planning a corporate event and expect around 30 people. What kind of group discounts does the theater offer?

Hello Mike, for groups of 10 or more we offer 15% off. For 25 or more it increases to 25% off. Dedicated group seating is also available. I can connect you with our corporate events team if you would like.
25% for 30 people is great! Please do connect me with the events team.
Done. Our corporate events coordinator will contact you within one business day at your registered email. Thank you for choosing us for your company event!
I have been a member for two years and I have attended over 20 shows. My loyalty points balance shows only 150 points which seems very low. Can you check?

Hello Alex, I am reviewing your account now. I can see your membership history. It looks like points from your bookings between January and March 2026 were not credited due to a system migration issue.
Yes that is exactly the period. There were about 8 bookings during that time.
I have manually credited 480 missing points to your account bringing your total to 630. You should see the update immediately. I apologize for the inconvenience.
No refund for u :D
The ticket will be closed then, thanks!
Ticket status changed to: CLOSED
Nice
